name: cc-skill-trace
description: Skill invocation debugger and visualizer for Claude Code — see which skills fired, when, and why
author: revo1290

scripts.release:patch: npm run build && npm version patch -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && npm version minor -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run build && npm version major -m 'chore: release v%s' && git push origin main --follow-tags
